title: No Natural Warden
description: This mod disables warden natural spawning
body:
## About the mod ##
This mod is just as simple as trying to execute a command, because it just turns off the warden spawning with the sculk blocks, but, you can still force it to spawn through eggs or commands.

It's just for disabling the wardens natural spawning in the survival worlds of people who don't like to get to fight a warden in their worlds.
You can enable the warden natural spawning again by using the gamerule doWardenSpawning

### important ###
The mod is only available for 1.20.1
